'''botahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eucaloric|eucaloric]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-t-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eucaloric|eucaloric]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| botahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:botahithi|botahithi]] || [[word:botahiji|botahiji]] || [[word:botahishi|botahishi]] || [[word:botahiki|botahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:botahuthuthu|botahuthuthu]] || [[word:botahujuju|botahujuju]] || [[word:botahushushu|botahushushu]] || [[word:botahukuku|botahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:botahuthu|botahuthu]] || [[word:botahuju|botahuju]] || [[word:botahushu|botahushu]] || [[word:botahuku|botahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:botahufthuf|botahufthuf]] || [[word:botahufjuf|botahufjuf]] || [[word:botahufshuf|botahufshuf]] || [[word:botahufkuf|botahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:botahethe|botahethe]] || [[word:botaheje|botaheje]] || [[word:botaheshe|botaheshe]] || [[word:botaheke|botaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:botahothotho|botahothotho]] || [[word:botahojojo|botahojojo]] || [[word:botahoshosho|botahoshosho]] || [[word:botahokoko|botahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:botahotho|botahotho]] || [[word:botahojo|botahojo]] || [[word:botahosho|botahosho]] || [[word:botahoko|botahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:botahofthof|botahofthof]] || [[word:botahofjof|botahofjof]] || [[word:botahofshof|botahofshof]] || [[word:botahofkof|botahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:botahÃŸfthÃŸf|botahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:botahÃŸfjÃŸf|botahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:botahÃŸfshÃŸf|botahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:botahÃŸfkÃŸf|botahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:botahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|botahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:botahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|botahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:botahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|botahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:botahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|botahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:botahÃŸfthÃŸf|botahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:botahÃŸfjÃŸf|botahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:botahÃŸfshÃŸf|botahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:botahÃŸfkÃŸf|botahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:botahÃŸfthÃŸf|botahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:botahÃŸfjÃŸf|botahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:botahÃŸfshÃŸf|botahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:botahÃŸfkÃŸf|botahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:botahÃḊthÃḊ|botahÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:botahÃḊjÃḊ|botahÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:botahÃḊshÃḊ|botahÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:botahÃḊkÃḊ|botahÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:botahathatha|botahathatha]] || [[word:botahajaja|botahajaja]] || [[word:botahashasha|botahashasha]] || [[word:botahakaka|botahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:botahatha|botahatha]] || [[word:botahaja|botahaja]] || [[word:botahasha|botahasha]] || [[word:botahaka|botahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:botahafthaf|botahafthaf]] || [[word:botahafjaf|botahafjaf]] || [[word:botahafshaf|botahafshaf]] || [[word:botahafkaf|botahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:botahasha|botahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:botahshÃḋsha|botahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:botahrosha|botahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:botahmusha|botahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:botahyasha|botahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobotahnkshÃḋsha|gobotahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobotahnkrosha|gobotahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobotahnkmusha|gobotahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobotahnkyasha|gobotahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:botatahasha|botatahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:botatahshÃḋsha|botatahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:botatahrosha|botatahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:botatahmusha|botatahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:botatahyasha|botatahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobotatahnkshÃḋsha|gobotatahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobotatahnkrosha|gobotatahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobotatahnkmusha|gobotatahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobotatahnkyasha|gobotatahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:betÃḊhasha|betÃḊhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:betÃḊhshÃḋsha|betÃḊhshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:betÃḊhrosha|betÃḊhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:betÃḊhmusha|betÃḊhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:betÃḊhyasha|betÃḊhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobetÃḊhnkshÃḋsha|gobetÃḊhnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobetÃḊhnkrosha|gobetÃḊhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobetÃḊhnkmusha|gobetÃḊhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobetÃḊhnkyasha|gobetÃḊhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:botfahasha|botfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:botfahshÃḋsha|botfahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:botfahrosha|botfahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:botfahmusha|botfahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:botfahyasha|botfahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobotfahnkshÃḋsha|gobotfahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobotfahnkrosha|gobotfahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobotfahnkmusha|gobotfahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobotfahnkyasha|gobotfahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
